entry.title: New: CR 25-2 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 17, CD1 (2025), to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget, General Budget Provisions, Section 18(A), to increase the maximum aggregate amount of unreimbursed transfers and loans from County funds to the Bond Fund or the Housing Interim Financing and Buy-Back Revolving Fund from $100,000,000 to $150,000,000.

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
